meta.title: Support
meta.description: Help, FAQ and contact for the Fl!p team.

header.title: We're here.
header.lead: Question, bug, game idea? The Fl!p team gets back to you fast.

items.a: Fl!p is available on the App Store and Google Play. Search for "Flip party games" or use the download buttons on the home page.
Fl!p is free with a set of core games available to everyone. A premium subscription unlocks the full catalog and new content.

items.q: Do I need internet to play?
items.a: A connection is needed for the first load. After that, most games work offline.

items.q: How do I report a bug or suggest a game?
items.a: Email us directly at info@fabiengiraudier.com — we read every message and we love community ideas.

items.q: How do I manage my premium subscription?
items.a: Manage your subscription from your App Store or Google Play account, in the subscriptions section of your device.
